# accessPointConnections

**Instance Property**

A list of access points to which the host connects for networks someone authorized to share to the device.

## Declaration

```swift
let accessPointConnections: [WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection]
```

## Discussion

The Wi-Fi Infrastructure framework filters this list to access points matching the predicate you provide when getting the [doc://com.apple.wifiinfrastructure/documentation/WiFiInfrastructure/WINetworkSharingProvider/accessPointConnectionEvents(matching:)] sequence.
title: accessPointConnections
